Includes an audible siren, top- mounted emergency strobe lights, a directional searchlight, one-way doors, sealed cabin (for prisoner transport), and a hardened bumper with 10 m winch cable mounted on the front for pulling vehicles.
Armored heavy weapons mount on the roof with a machine gun with a 200 rounds of ammunition.
Armored heavy weapons mount on the roof with a Heavy Laser.

id-00001.name: Hover Transport, TrailRaptor

notes.p: Specialtizing in hover vehicles, especially heavy-duty transports and skiffs. GravHawk’s TrailRaptor series dominates the badlands—hover-capable, armor-skinned, and built to tow half a colony’s worth of gear. Their vehicles are favored by survey crews, nomadic traders, and bounty teams who need reliability over style.

list.li: Improved Safety Systems, occupants take half damage

notes.p: Like their ground-bound cousins, hover transports ferry cargo (often commercial) between the cities of any given world. They have the top speed that a ground transport has, but they can hover up to 1 m above the ground. Hover transports are often used where highways don’t exist. Although they are fixed-altitude hover vehicles (using powerful fans to create lift or relying on modern repulsor technology), they are designed to hover between 50 cm and 100 cm to clear rough terrain. This bobbing and wobbling can sometimes cause the pilot and his passenger to become motion sick when they first start piloting… and being able to handle this extra motion is what sets a veteran hover transport pilot apart from the rookies.

id-00001.primaryfunction: A large trawler that floats on air. Wealthy corporations deliver their goods to eager hands full of credits by use of these vehicles.

id-00002.framesize: A hovering platform-like mini-barge, the land skiff is oft used to ferry cargo to distant sites. A canopy can be extended to protect cargo from weather extremes.

item_description.p: PER 60
INT 60
Pilot (Land Skiff) +0
Explorer (Navigation) +0
Technician (Vehicles) -10
Artist (Performance) -10

Includes an audible siren, top- mounted emergency strobe lights, a directional searchlight, one-way doors, sealed cabin (for prisoner transport), and a hardened bumper with 10 m winch cable mounted on the front for pulling vehicles.
Armored heavy weapons mount on the roof with a machine gun with a 200 rounds of ammunition.

id-00002.name: Land Skiff, TrailRaptor

notes.p: Specialtizing in hover vehicles, especially heavy-duty transports and skiffs. GravHawk’s TrailRaptor series dominates the badlands—hover-capable, armor-skinned, and built to tow half a colony’s worth of gear. Their vehicles are favored by survey crews, nomadic traders, and bounty teams who need reliability over style.

list.li: Improved Safety Systems, occupants take half damage

notes.p: A very large hover platform designed for transporting vehicles, people, or cargo across long distances, the land skiff is not too dissimilar to a water transport that hovers over the land. Popular on desert worlds where the land is mostly smooth wastes or dunes, the land skiff is a variable-altitude vehicle, capable of reaching altitudes of up to 1,000 m. It can climb half its acceleration per turn, or descend its full acceleration. It can do this to clear trees, boulders, large dunes, or annoying animals. Land skiffs can carry up to eight people, one of which must stand at a navigation/piloting station. Some stylish land skiffs actually use a wheel similar to old sailing vessels, though many just have a simple cockpit. The other passengers are given seating that swivels to face any direction they wish – providing a very comfortable ride with great visibility but poor cover against enemies.

id-00002.primaryfunction: A hovering platform-like mini-barge, the land skiff is oft used to ferry cargo to distant sites. A canopy can be extended to protect cargo from weather extremes.

id-00003.name: Hover Cycle, TrailRaptor

notes.p: Specialtizing in hover vehicles, especially heavy-duty transports and skiffs. GravHawk’s TrailRaptor series dominates the badlands—hover-capable, armor-skinned, and built to tow half a colony’s worth of gear. Their vehicles are favored by survey crews, nomadic traders, and bounty teams who need reliability over style.

list.li: Improved Safety Systems, occupants take half damage

notes.p: Hover cycles are single-person open-cockpit hovering vehicles. They ride on a 50 cm-high cushion of air, and can traverse over any relatively smooth surface (including still water). They are found in cities or smooth/dry wastelands, and seldom make their way off-road into the rough. Note that some hover cycles rely on air fans at balanced locations to produce lift, and rear-facing fans to produce thrust. Such hover vehicles are larger but still considered a cycle, using the same statistics as the more modern hover cycles which rely on repulsor technology to repel the ground away. Hover cycles are a symbol of wealth, prestige, and status. They are fast, sleek, and impressive.

id-00003.primaryfunction: A symbol of wealth, prestige, and status. Fast, sleek, and impressive. Hover cycles ride on a cushion of air or repulsor force and can reach amazing velocities.

item_description.p: PER 60
INT 60
Pilot (Land Skiff) +0
Explorer (Navigation) +0
Technician (Vehicles) -10
Artist (Performance) -10
Armored heavy weapons mount on the roof with a machine gun with a 200 rounds of ammunition.

Includes an audible siren, top- mounted emergency strobe lights, a directional searchlight, one-way doors, sealed cabin (for prisoner transport), and a hardened bumper with 10 m winch cable mounted on the front for pulling vehicles.

id-00004.name: Hover Truck, TrailRaptor

notes.p: Specialtizing in hover vehicles, especially heavy-duty transports and skiffs. GravHawk’s TrailRaptor series dominates the badlands—hover-capable, armor-skinned, and built to tow half a colony’s worth of gear. Their vehicles are favored by survey crews, nomadic traders, and bounty teams who need reliability over style.

list.li: Improved Safety Systems, occupants take half damage

notes.p: Hover cars are quite common in the more settled regions of the frontier. On the heavily citied worlds of the central frontier, they are the preferred modes of transport. Hover cars appear like normal ground cars but lack wheels. Instead, they have a padded hover skirt under which rests either large air fans (which blow air downward with sufficient power to generate lift) or repulsor lifts. Other than their lower maximum speeds and poorer maneuverability, a hover car is very much like a hover cycle. The advantage of a hover car, however, is the canopied crew compartment, which provides protection to those within.

id-00004.primaryfunction: A hovering vehicle common in civilized centers of the frontier. They hover with large hoverfans or by repulsor technology and can reach impressive speeds.

item_description.p: PER 60
INT 60
Pilot (Air Car) +0
Explorer (Navigation) +0
Technician (Vehicles) -10
Marksman -10
Violence Interlock, can only fire upon targets that have directly fire upon the vehicle
A belly mounted machine gun with 360 rotation.
An advanced electronics suite with teh capabilities of A/V Scanner, IR Scanner, Lifeform Scanner, & MagnificationScanner.
All range increments are doubled.

id-00005.name: Jetcopter, Vigilant

notes.p: Vigilant Class aircraft are the backbone of frontier airspace control. With whisper-quiet engines and omni-directional thrusters, they’re used by corporate security forces and mercenary companies alike.

list.li: Very quiet engine, cannot be heard easily

notes.p: These are very common air vehicles found everywhere aerial travel is required. Much less expensive than air cars, jetcopters are able to hover, lift or descend, and pitch forward/backward or side to side. Their maneuverability is appreciable. They also have a repulsor jet engine located on their tail, able to propel them at very fast speeds when they must.  JETCOPTER Although not as fast or maneuverable as the prestigious air car, the jetcopter sees more widespread use in a busy frontier. Its lower cost and versatile cargo area help ensure that it will continue to be used by travelers in the decades to come.

id-00005.primaryfunction: For fast travel by air jetcopters are used to ferry passengers and cargo quickly. They are popular among law enforcement organizations of the frontier.

item_description.p: A series of plasma injectors that give momentary boosts of extreme thrust. There are 10 boosts that will double the acceleration rate of the vehicle for one turn. If the boost is used while at top speed, the vehicle will temporarily be permitted to exceed it, but will slow back down to top speed after a few turns. A plasma canister of 10 boosts costs only 100©. For each boost, there is a 10% chance the plasma will fail to ignite. On a roll of 95-99 the after burner is damaged and must be replaced.
An advanced electronics suite with teh capabilities of A/V Scanner, IR Scanner, Lifeform Scanner, & Magnification Scanner.
All range increments are doubled.

id-00006.name: Cyclejet, Vigilant

notes.p: Vigilant Class aircraft are the backbone of frontier airspace control. With whisper-quiet engines and omni-directional thrusters, they’re used by corporate security forces and mercenary companies alike.

list.li: Very quiet engine, cannot be heard easily

notes.p: Engineered to fulfill that need for speed common to many pilots and thrill seekers, the cyclejet is one of the fastest vehicles in the known frontier. Designed for a single rider, they have a variable altitude adjuster. Their open cockpit design limits the altitude they can travel. Security and police forces favor these vehicles due to their speed, maneuverability, and the ability to cover any terrain desired.

A combination hover vehicle and repulsor jet- powered aircraft, the cyclejet has more models than any other vehicle. The canopy extends far enough to provide an air-pocket around the pilot, and oxygen is exhausted into the air-pocket to help the pilot with altitude air density. Although a passenger is able to fit on the seat with the pilot, this is less than comfortable and most cyclejet pilots (aptly called “cycle jocks”) reject the idea of carrying someone unless they must.

id-00006.primaryfunction: Capable of reaching mach 0.8, the cyclejet is a recreational vehicle for screaming through the air at impressive speeds.

item_description.p: PER 60
INT 60
Pilot (Air Car) +0
Explorer (Navigation) +0
Technician (Vehicles) -10
Marksman -10
Violence Interlock, can only fire upon targets that have directly fire upon the vehicle

A series of plasma injectors that give momentary boosts of extreme thrust. There are 10 boosts that will double the acceleration rate of the vehicle for one turn. If the boost is used while at top speed, the vehicle will temporarily be permitted to exceed it, but will slow back down to top speed after a few turns. A plasma canister of 10 boosts costs only 100©. For each boost, there is a 10% chance the plasma will fail to ignite. On a roll of 95-99 the after burner is damaged and must be replaced.
An advanced electronics suite with teh capabilities of A/V Scanner, IR Scanner, Lifeform Scanner, & MagnificationScanner.
All range increments are doubled.
A belly mounted machine gun with 360 rotation.

id-00007.name: Air Car, Vigilant

notes.p: Vigilant Class aircraft are the backbone of frontier airspace control. With whisper-quiet engines and omni-directional thrusters, they’re used by corporate security forces and mercenary companies alike.

list.li: Very quiet engine, cannot be heard easily

notes.p: The air car is a repulsor-jet powered vertical take- off and landing vehicle. The engines are mounted on mechanical swivels; once airborne, they swivel back to provide forward thrust. This swiveling allows for some aerial maneuverability not found in some other aircraft. Air cars are quite popular among those who can afford them – mostly corporate executives or well-off travelers. They are quite fast, can take off and land on a rooftop, and can hover (albeit noisily) near platforms and such.

id-00007.primaryfunction: Although a bit expensive, the air car is fairly common in the heavier populated worlds located in the hubs of the frontier. Air traffic is heavy on densely settled worlds.

item_description.p: Bio-lock; only starts for programmed owner

id-00008.name: Air Car, Type R

notes.p: Type R vehicles are a cult favorite among couriers, racers, and smugglers. Lightweight, fast, and dangerously customizable, it’s the go-to for anyone who wants to thread the needle between canyon walls or zip through urban ruins.

list.li: Power Hungry, +1 additional parabattery or 1 Type higher

notes.p: The air car is a repulsor-jet powered vertical take- off and landing vehicle. The engines are mounted on mechanical swivels; once airborne, they swivel back to provide forward thrust. This swiveling allows for some aerial maneuverability not found in some other aircraft. Air cars are quite popular among those who can afford them – mostly corporate executives or well-off travelers. They are quite fast, can take off and land on a rooftop, and can hover (albeit noisily) near platforms and such.

list.li: Power Hungry, +1 additional parabattery or 1 Type higher

notes.p: Engineered to fulfill that need for speed common to many pilots and thrill seekers, the cyclejet is one of the fastest vehicles in the known frontier. Designed for a single rider, they have a variable altitude adjuster. Their open cockpit design limits the altitude they can travel. Security and police forces favor these vehicles due to their speed, maneuverability, and the ability to cover any terrain desired.

A combination hover vehicle and repulsor jet- powered aircraft, the cyclejet has more models than any other vehicle. The canopy extends far enough to provide an air-pocket around the pilot, and oxygen is exhausted into the air-pocket to help the pilot with altitude air density. Although a passenger is able to fit on the seat with the pilot, this is less than comfortable and most cyclejet pilots (aptly called “cycle jocks”) reject the idea of carrying someone unless they must.

item_description.p: Bio-lock; only starts for programmed owner

id-00010.name: Ground Car, Type R

notes.p: Type R vehicles are a cult favorite among couriers, racers, and smugglers. Lightweight, fast, and dangerously customizable, it’s the go-to for anyone who wants to thread the needle between canyon walls or zip through urban ruins.

list.li: Power Hungry, +1 additional parabattery or 1 Type higher

notes.p: These are wheeled vehicles designed for use in urban settings, where roads are built for their use. Additionally, if there is enough clearance between the ground and the chassis, they can go offroad with limits, and sometimes require special tires for certain types of terrain.

Ground cars are by far the most common form of transport for the families and commoners of the frontier. Additionally, adventurers often prefer them because of their relative inexpensiveness and the ability to provide decent protection for their occupants.

id-00010.primaryfunction: By far the most common vehicle, usually has three to six wheels and can be found on and off roads throughout the planets of the frontier.

item_description.p: Bio-lock; only starts for programmed owner

id-00011.name: Groundcycle, Type R

notes.p: Type R vehicles are a cult favorite among couriers, racers, and smugglers. Lightweight, fast, and dangerously customizable, it’s the go-to for anyone who wants to thread the needle between canyon walls or zip through urban ruins.

list.li: Power Hungry, +1 additional parabattery or 1 Type higher

notes.p: These vehicles are designed for inexpensive one- man transportation over short distances. Larger versions can carry an extra rider in addition to a limited amount of gear in side-saddles. Ground cycles typically have two wheels made of rubber compound and rely on the downward pull of gravity for road handling, and are usually built for higher-G worlds.

id-00011.primaryfunction: A very common electric street motorcycle. Made \nfor one pilot, with barely enough room for a \npassenger. It’s fast, it’s maneuverable, and it’s fun!

item_description.p: Bio-lock; only starts for programmed owner

id-00012.name: Hover Car, Type R

notes.p: Type R vehicles are a cult favorite among couriers, racers, and smugglers. Lightweight, fast, and dangerously customizable, it’s the go-to for anyone who wants to thread the needle between canyon walls or zip through urban ruins.

list.li: Power Hungry, +1 additional parabattery or 1 Type higher

notes.p: Hover cars are quite common in the more settled regions of the frontier. On the heavily citied worlds of the central frontier, they are the preferred modes of transport. Hover cars appear like normal ground cars but lack wheels. Instead, they have a padded hover skirt under which rests either large air fans (which blow air downward with sufficient power to generate lift) or repulsor lifts. Other than their lower maximum speeds and poorer maneuverability, a hover car is very much like a hover cycle. The advantage of a hover car, however, is the canopied crew compartment, which provides protection to those within.

id-00012.primaryfunction: A hovering vehicle common in civilized centers of the frontier. They hover with large hoverfans or by repulsor technology and can reach impressive speeds.

item_description.p: Bio-lock; only starts for programmed owner

id-00013.name: Hover Cycle, Type R

notes.p: Type R vehicles are a cult favorite among couriers, racers, and smugglers. Lightweight, fast, and dangerously customizable, it’s the go-to for anyone who wants to thread the needle between canyon walls or zip through urban ruins.

list.li: Power Hungry, +1 additional parabattery or 1 Type higher

notes.p: Hover cycles are single-person open-cockpit hovering vehicles. They ride on a 50 cm-high cushion of air, and can traverse over any relatively smooth surface (including still water). They are found in cities or smooth/dry wastelands, and seldom make their way off-road into the rough. Note that some hover cycles rely on air fans at balanced locations to produce lift, and rear-facing fans to produce thrust. Such hover vehicles are larger but still considered a cycle, using the same statistics as the more modern hover cycles which rely on repulsor technology to repel the ground away. Hover cycles are a symbol of wealth, prestige, and status. They are fast, sleek, and impressive.

id-00013.primaryfunction: A symbol of wealth, prestige, and status. Fast, sleek, and impressive. Hover cycles ride on a cushion of air or repulsor force and can reach amazing velocities.

id-00014.framesize: Small-frame ground vehicle (single tread track) x

item_description.p: Bio-lock; only starts for programmed owner

id-00014.name: Snow Cycle, Type R

notes.p: Type R vehicles are a cult favorite among couriers, racers, and smugglers. Lightweight, fast, and dangerously customizable, it’s the go-to for anyone who wants to thread the needle between canyon walls or zip through urban ruins.

list.li: Power Hungry, +1 additional parabattery or 1 Type higher

notes.p: A snow cycle is a small two-man transport having two skids in front and a single track in back for traction. It is designed for traveling on snow or ice only.

id-00014.primaryfunction: Designed for crossing frozen terrain, such as tundra, the snow cycle isn’t really effective on other types of terrain. Uncomfortable for long journeys.

id-00015.name: Explorer, Holden 508

notes.p: These are boxy and cheap. They’re mass produced and common in the Frontier, even if they’re a bit uncomfortable, they endure. They’re one of the Hold’s largest exports.

This is a very durable four-wheeled ground vehicle built for traveling over the most rugged terrain with a large assortment of passengers. The vehicle’s sturdy construction makes it a boon to scouts and explorers. Extra-wide tires are each driven by separate engines to allow the vehicle to maneuver in tight spots and over the most impossible terrain.

Merchant companies hire independently-owned vehicles to carry small shipments of high value. The additional passengers are able to help defend against any would-be attackers. Bandits think twice before trying to prey on a well-equipped explorer.

id-00015.primaryfunction: The ultimate exploration vehicle, perfect for new and dangerous worlds. Most owners keep a spare parabattery or two in their cargo area, for long journeys.

id-00021.name: Ground Car, Holden 502

notes.p: These are boxy and cheap. They’re mass produced and common in the Frontier, even if they’re a bit uncomfortable, they endure. They’re one of the Hold’s largest exports.

These are wheeled vehicles designed for use in urban settings, where roads are built for their use. Additionally, if there is enough clearance between the ground and the chassis, they can go offroad with limits, and sometimes require special tires for certain types of terrain.

Ground cars are by far the most common form of transport for the families and commoners of the frontier. Additionally, adventurers often prefer them because of their relative inexpensiveness and the ability to provide decent protection for their occupants.

id-00021.primaryfunction: By far the most common vehicle, usually has three to six wheels and can be found on and off roads throughout the planets of the frontier.

id-00022.name: Offroader, Holden 544

notes.p: These are boxy and cheap. They’re mass produced and common in the Frontier, even if they’re a bit uncomfortable, they endure. They’re one of the Hold’s largest exports.

Like the ground car, the offroader is a four- wheeled vehicle designed with rubber-compound wheels that cling to the road. Unlike the ground car, however, the offroader is specifically designed to leave the roads of urban civilization behind. They have an open cockpit, rugged suspension, and are higher than a ground car. A hard top can be purchased for 500© that will enclose the cockpit area to keep debris and rain off the occupants. Although statistically inferior to a ground car, the benefit of using a different category of movement while traveling off-road is a significant benefit when adventures take your character off thebeaten path.

id-00022.primaryfunction: Designed to brave the complex terrain found \nbetween settled areas, this vehicle is popular \namong explorers for its durability.

id-00016.name: Ground Car, Falconet

notes.p: Falconet coupes are the envy of frontier elites—sleek, fast, and equipped with terrain-adaptive cruise modes. Though marketed as a luxury vehicle, its stealth systems and reinforced chassis make it a favorite of spies and rogue diplomats.

list.li: Improved Safety System, occupants take only half damage from any crashes or damage
Very quiet engine, cannot be heard easily
High-Tech Jamming Suite; IR, ECM, Lifeform & Sonic
High-Tech AI, adaptive cruise, +10 pilot checks

id-00018.primaryfunction: A hovering vehicle common in civilized centers of the frontier. They hover with large hoverfans or by repulsor technology and can reach impressive speeds.

item_description.p: This device receives satellite radio signals for the driver’s listening pleasure and provides a navigation map, simple security alerts, hands-free calling via built-in wristcom that syncs with local time sources, remote diagnostics systems, stolen vehicle tracking, and remote shutdown. This is a popular package, and OnNET maintains emergency response vehicles on most civilized worlds to rapidly respond to wrecks whose vehicles were equipped with OnNET.

A small cabin for sleeping with a video system and microwave built into one of the side walls for entertainment and eating, as well as various cubbies and drawers to hold food and other needs while traveling long distances.
Accommodates +10% passengers (min +1)
Stowage Compartments +10% Cargo (min +1)

id-00019.name: Powerboat, WaveRunner

notes.p: The original product line from Mirek, it is still sought after as a performance luxury watercraft. Known for it's speed, handling and ability for cusotmization.

Powerboats are pleasure watercraft with open cockpits and stowage bays for personal gear. They are propelled through the water by pump jets or propellers/impellers and can often be found pulling skiers on fine days. They provide sufficient cover to its six passengers (one of whom is the pilot) as to make it useful in a combat situation. On worlds with vast amounts of water, the powerboat is the main method of transport from city to city, and fills the same role that ground cars play on traditional highways. Coastal patrol boats piloted by skilled soldiers often escort yachts and cargo ships and use powerboats as their primary means of transport. Unfortunately, powerboats are also used by pirates.

id-00019.primaryfunction: Zooming along the water’s surface with speed and agility, a powerboat is great for smuggling on worlds where water transport is common.

item_description.p: This device receives satellite radio signals for the driver’s listening pleasure and provides a navigation map, simple security alerts, hands-free calling via built-in wristcom that syncs with local time sources, remote diagnostics systems, stolen vehicle tracking, and remote shutdown. This is a popular package, and OnNET maintains emergency response vehicles on most civilized worlds to rapidly respond to wrecks whose vehicles were equipped with OnNET.
Accommodates +10% passengers (min +1)

(Concealed until activated)
Extra missile payload, 4 missiles

id-00020.name: Yacht, WaveRunner

notes.p: The original product line from Mirek, it is still sought after as a performance luxury watercraft. Known for it's speed, handling and ability for cusotmization.

Yachts are larger than powerboats and typically represent the more luxurious option for those who must (or choose to) get around in the water. They are able to support up to ten passengers (usually a spoiled rich game developer and nine female companions) and have enough stowage capacity for up to 25 units of cargo (that’s a lot of Champagne). Yachts have multiple decks and are often large enough that passengers easily forget they’re at sea. The price of the yacht is for the basic ship only; making them luxurious can cause the ship’s cost to double, triple, or even more. Some yachts are hundreds of thousands of credits – a great way for a rich person to squander his fortune.

id-00020.primaryfunction: A symbol of prestige, the basic price shown below is only the entry-level model. To make it more luxurious, spend as much as you’d like!

notes.p: A hover coupe with adaptive climate pods, privacy shielding, and AI-assisted terrain smoothing

list.li: Improved Safety System, occupants take only half damage from any crashes or damage
